options.query: | mstats count("cisco.content.five-seconds") as c WHERE index=cisco_mdt BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as label | eval value=label | fields label value | sort label

| mstats avg("cisco.content.statistics.in-octets") as in_octets avg("cisco.content.statistics.out-octets") as out_octets WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name span=5m | where NOT match(name, "Null0|Loopback") | chart limit=10 avg(in_octets) as "In Octets" avg(out_octets) as "Out Octets" BY _time name

| mstats latest("cisco.content.statistics.in-errors") as "In Errors" latest("cisco.content.statistics.out-errors") as "Out Errors" latest("cisco.content.statistics.in-octets") as "In Octets" latest("cisco.content.statistics.out-octets") as "Out Octets" latest("cisco.content.statistics.in-discards") as "In Discards" latest("cisco.content.speed") as Speed WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name | where NOT match(name, "Null0|Loopback|Vlan") | rename name as Interface | sort -"In Octets" | table Interface Speed "In Octets" "Out Octets" "In Errors" "Out Errors" "In Discards"

| mstats avg("cisco.content.statistics.rx-kbps") as rx avg("cisco.content.statistics.tx-kbps") as tx WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name span=5m | where NOT match(name, "Null0|Loopback") | where rx > 0 OR tx > 0 | chart limit=10 avg(rx) as Rx avg(tx) as Tx BY _time name

| mstats avg("cisco.content.statistics.rx-pps") as rx avg("cisco.content.statistics.tx-pps") as tx WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name span=5m | where NOT match(name, "Null0|Loopback") | where rx > 0 OR tx > 0 | chart limit=10 avg(rx) as "Rx pps" avg(tx) as "Tx pps" BY _time name

| mstats latest("cisco.content.vlan-interfaces.subinterface") as Subinterfaces WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY id cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch id as "VLAN ID" | table Switch "VLAN ID" Subinterfaces | sort Switch "VLAN ID"
| mstats avg("cisco.content.stp-detail.topology-changes") as changes WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY instance span=5m

| mstats latest("cisco.content.stp-detail.root-cost") as "Root Cost" latest("cisco.content.stp-detail.designated-root-priority") as "Root Priority" latest("cisco.content.stp-detail.topology-changes") as "Topo Changes" latest("cisco.content.stp-detail.bridge-priority") as "Bridge Priority" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY instance cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch instance as Instance | table Switch Instance "Root Priority" "Root Cost" "Bridge Priority" "Topo Changes" | sort Switch Instance

| mstats latest("cisco.content.arp-entry.address_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id vrf value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch vrf as VRF value as "IP Address" | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.arp-entry.hardware_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id vrf value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch vrf as VRF value as "MAC Address" | fields Switch VRF "MAC Address"] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.arp-entry.interface_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id vrf value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch vrf as VRF value as Interface | fields Switch VRF Interface] | stats values("IP Address") as "IP Address" values("MAC Address") as "MAC Address" values(Interface) as Interface BY Switch VRF | sort Switch VRF

| mstats latest("cisco.content.matm-mac-entry.mac_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id table-type value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch table-type as "Table Type" value as "MAC Address" | table Switch "Table Type" "MAC Address" | sort Switch "Table Type"
| mstats latest("cisco.content.matm-mac-entry.mac_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | stats dc(value) as count

| mstats latest("cisco.content.device-name_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id device-id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch device-id as "Device ID" value as "Device Name" | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.local-intf-name_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id device-id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch device-id as "Device ID" value as "Local Interface" | fields Switch "Device ID" "Local Interface"] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.port-id_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id device-id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch device-id as "Device ID" value as "Remote Port" | fields Switch "Device ID" "Remote Port"] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.platform-name_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id device-id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch device-id as "Device ID" value as Platform | fields Switch "Device ID" Platform] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.mgmt-address_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id device-id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch device-id as "Device ID" value as "Mgmt IP" | fields Switch "Device ID" "Mgmt IP"] | stats values("Device Name") as "Device Name" values("Local Interface") as "Local Intf" values("Remote Port") as "Remote Port" values(Platform) as Platform values("Mgmt IP") as "Mgmt IP" BY Switch "Device ID" | sort Switch "Device ID"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.lldp-state-details.enabled") as Enabled latest("cisco.content.lldp-state-details.frame-in") as "Frames In" latest("cisco.content.lldp-state-details.frame-out") as "Frames Out" latest("cisco.content.lldp-state-details.entries-aged-out") as "Aged Out" latest("cisco.content.lldp-state-details.frame-error-in") as "Frame Errors" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.lldp-intf-details.if-name_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as Interface | table Switch Interface | sort Switch Interface
| mstats latest("cisco.content.port-details.oper-mode_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | stats count BY value | rename value as Mode

| mstats latest("cisco.keys.if-name_info") as if_flag latest("cisco.content.admin-mode_info") as admin_flag latest("cisco.content.port-details.oper-mode_info") as oper_flag latest("cisco.content.port-details.access-mode-id") as "Access VLAN" latest("cisco.content.port-details.trunk-nat-mode-id") as "Native VLAN" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.encoding_path="Cisco-IOS-XE-switchport-oper*" cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as Interface | table Switch Interface "Access VLAN" "Native VLAN" | sort Switch Interface

title: Cisco IOS XE — Network
description: Interfaces, VLANs, STP, ARP, MAC, LLDP, CDP, Switchport
